name: Mandrake Resources Limited
summary: Mandrake Resources Limited, a junior exploration company, engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral resources in Australia. It explores for gold, silver, nickel, platinum group elements, and copper deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Berinka Pine Creek gold project covering an area of 289 square kilometers located in the Pine Creek Orogen, Northern Territory. It also holds interest in the Jimperding project situated in north east of Perth, Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Bronson Group Limited and changed its name to Mandrake Resources Limited in August 2019. Mandrake Resources Limited is based in West Perth, Australia.
